languages.original_text: "Lord Seberian remained there... I understand why the Lord Captain made this choice. The great rulers of the past are better left in the past."

languages.text: "То, что господин Себериан остался там... Я понимаю, почему Лорд-капитан так поступил{mf||а} со своим предком. Великим правителям прошлого... лучше оставаться в прошлом".
"Lord Seberian remained there... I understand why the Lord Captain made this choice. The great rulers of the past are better left in the past."

"Lord Seberian remained there... I understand why the Lord Captain made this choice. The great rulers of the past are better left in the past."

languages.text: 「セベリアン卿はそこで留まりました... 私はなぜ艦長がこのような選択をしたのか理解できます。過去の偉大な支配者は、過去に留めておくべきです」
languages.original_text: "Lord Seberian remained there... I understand why the Lord Captain made this choice. The great rulers of the past are better left in the past."

traits.locale_text: 「セベリアンの卿はそこで留まりました... 私はなぜ艦長がこのような選択をしたのか理解できます。過去の偉大な支配者は、過去に留めておくべきです。」

languages.text: « Le seigneur Seberian est resté là-bas... Je comprends pourquoi {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a fait ce choix. Les grands dirigeants d'autrefois appartiennent au passé. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Seberian remained there... I understand why the Lord Captain made this choice. The great rulers of the past are better left in the past."

traits.locale_text: « Le seigneur Seberian est resté là-bas... Je comprends pourquoi {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a fait ce choix. Les grands dirigeants d'autrefois appartiennent au passé. »

languages.text: "Lord Seberian ist dort geblieben ... Ich kann die Entscheidung des Lord Captains nachvollziehen. Die großen Herrscher der Vergangenheit sollten in der Vergangenheit bleiben."
languages.original_text: "Lord Seberian remained there... I understand why the Lord Captain made this choice. The great rulers of the past are better left in the past."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Seberian ist dort geblieben ... Ich kann die Entscheidung des Lord Captains nachvollziehen. Die großen Herrscher der Vergangenheit sollten in der Vergangenheit bleiben."

languages.text: "Lord Seberian orada kaldı... Lord Kaptan'ın neden bu seçimi yaptığını anlıyorum. Geçmişin büyük hükümdarları geçmişte bırakılmalı."
languages.original_text: "Lord Seberian remained there... I understand why the Lord Captain made this choice. The great rulers of the past are better left in the past."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Seberian orada kaldı... Lord Kaptan'ın neden bu seçimi yaptığını anlıyorum. Geçmişin büyük hükümdarları geçmişte bırakılmalı."

languages.text: «Lord Seberian se ha quedado allí... Entiendo por qué {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán ha tomado esta decisión. Los grandes dirigentes del pasado están mejor en el pasado».
languages.original_text: "Lord Seberian remained there... I understand why the Lord Captain made this choice. The great rulers of the past are better left in the past."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Seberian se ha quedado allí... Entiendo por qué {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán ha tomado esta decisión. Los grandes dirigentes del pasado están mejor en el pasado».

languages.text: “塞贝里安大人留在了那里……我理解舰长大人做出的抉择。过去的伟大统治者，还是留在过去为好。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Seberian remained there... I understand why the Lord Captain made this choice. The great rulers of the past are better left in the past."

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安大人留在了那里……我理解舰长大人做出的抉择。过去的伟大统治者，还是留在过去为好。”
